chunks.text: Ron Fearing sees insects as inspiration for a special breed of robots - EECS at Berkeley The research of Prof. Ron Fearing and Mechanical Engineering graduate student Carlos Casarez on cooperative step climbing is featured on the NSF Engineering Discoveries website in an article titled “Roach-like robots run, climb and communicate with people” . Since the 1990’s, Prof. Fearing has been developing biomimetic robots capable or remarkable feats of speed and maneuverability. Categories Faculty publications Research View Open Faculty Positions
